name: Criteo S.A.
summary: PART I History and Development of the Company Criteo S.A. was initially incorporated as a socit par actions simplifie, or S.A.S., under the laws of the French Republic on November 3, 2005, for a period of 99 years and subsequently converted to a socit anonyme, or S.A. We are registered at the Paris Commerce and Companies Register under the number 484 786 249. Our agent for service of process in the United States ("U.S.") is National Registered Agents, Inc.
